nasb.text: For this reason, therefore, I requested to see you and to speak with you, for I am wearing this chain for the sake of the hope of Israel.”

esv.text: For this reason, therefore, I have asked to see you and speak with you, since it is because of the hope of Israel that I am wearing this chain.”

cnv.text: 因此，我請你們來見面談談。我原是為了以色列的盼望，才帶上這條鎖鍊的。”

ccb.text: 为此，我才请你们来当面谈，我受捆绑是为了以色列人所盼望的那位。”

csbs.text: 因这理由，我请你们来见面谈话。其实我是为了以色列所盼望的事，才被这锁链捆锁的。”
